reviews.review_title: THIS GAME IS STOLEN AND FULLY SKIDDED!!!
reviews.review_description: Do not download or support this absolute trash. The developer claims they spent eight months solo developing this game, but it is nothing but stolen and skidded slop. The entire map is stolen directly from another developer called "Noxgames" from a game named "LAU" (Lethal Ape Ultimate). On top of that, the monsters are just uncredited, publicly bought assets from a Buy Me a Coffee page and another project called "Re-Ape" by NTGfairy. Instead of leaving proper credit, the developer actively wiped the original owners' and devs' names to put their own friends on the credits list. Taking assets from other creators and removing their credits is straight-up garbage. Save your time and DO NOT GET THIS GAME!!!!

developer_response.body:
This review contains several serious accusations, including claims that the game, map, and assets were stolen and that credits were intentionally removed. These claims are false.

Assets used in the development of the game were obtained and used through legitimate means. No evidence has been provided to support the accusations made in this review.

This review was posted shortly after moderation action was taken against players who were violating community rules. Because of that timing, I do not believe this review accurately reflects the game itself.

I welcome constructive criticism, bug reports, and suggestions for improvement, but false accusations and personal attacks do not help players make informed decisions. I encourage players to try the game and judge it based on their own experience.

reviews.review_description:
First of all, I’m writing this not only for the deletion of this App Lab, but also for YOUR safety. The map is taken from another dev known as "Noxgames," and the name of the game was called "LAU" or "Lethal Ape Ultimate," with some things removed. Yes, I have proof of this.

I would also like to note that being a solo dev doesn’t mean you can take assets from different games. And no, it did not take you EIGHT months to make this horrible skidded slop game. Some of the monsters are also from a Buy Me a Coffee page, and one of the monsters is from another project called "Re-Ape." NTGfairy made it, and his monsters are publicly buyable, but that doesn’t make it any better because you then end up removing the credits of the original owners and devs of LAU and putting your own people on there, which is straight-up BS.

I will also be posting a video on this, and it won’t get taken down unless you can actually contact me on my Discord, "frowlz," and make a sound argument. Other than that, I will make a video on this game and contact Nox and Meta about this.

developer_response.body:
I want to address the claims made in this review because a lot of the information being spread is simply false.

My game is not a leaked or reuploaded copy of LAU/Lethal Ape Ultimate. I do not have a released copy of that game. The only thing I shared publicly were screenshots in my Discord to show inspiration and the direction I wanted my revamp to take visually.

The current version of my game is entirely my own project that I’ve spent around 8–9 months developing. Like many games in the genre, it may share inspiration or similar ideas, but that does not make it a stolen copy. I do indeed have some free 3D models in my game. Many solo developers do that. The monster model made by NGTfairy is a FREE model he gave away on a youtube video. The popular game “Lethal Ape Deluxe” uses the exact same model and the game has I believe 11-12 thousand reviews and no one mentions them using the model.

There are dozens of copies of Lethal Ape and Lethal Ape Redux on the platform, so it’s confusing and unfair that my project was singled out and publicly accused without actual evidence. Especially since it truly isn’t a mere “copy.”

I also want to make it clear that I respect other developers and their work. If anyone has legitimate concerns, I’m open to respectful discussion, but spreading accusations publicly without proof only harms developers and communities unnecessarily.
 
SubLiminal Slop is also not an AppLab game. My game is released on the meta store, and meta themselves played the game, checked for bugs, copyright stuff, and any stolen assets. They found none. Meaning my game has every right to be on the meta store. Everyone is entitled to their opinions but spreading false accusations is not okay. I sort of understand where your coming from due to the images I shared in the discord server, however, next time acquire more information before you make accusations. Thanks man 👍

reviews.review_description: He said he made the whole revamp BUT it is a 10 dollar bought project and all he did was change the wall textures. This is a BIG skid! do not play

developer_response.body: The revamp was built using assets and resources that I have the rights to use. The review contains several claims that are inaccurate. Players are welcome to join the game and judge the update for themselves.

reviews.review_description:
I was making a video with my friend for his YouTube channel about checking out games and boy was I happy we found this!
The owner is super nice and showed us where stuff was, the monsters were cool, and map is pretty cool. I don’t see why anyone would hate this and he also stated he doesn’t steal assets and asks for permission to use them. Overall 10/10 game, best game I’ve played in a while

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! I definitely don't steal assets, 90% of my games assets come from me, while the others are free sound effects, OST's, or 3D models. The revamp will be coming out pretty soon and I have been working on it for about three months, which is why the game hasn't been updated in a while.

reviews.review_title: Asset ripping, ai, and just plain bad???
reviews.review_description: Most of the models and i would assume code is too. The games media assets such as the logo are ai generated. And finally the intro is way too loud, your hand is sideways, and you cant grab stuff. This game is for sub 5 chuds.

developer_response.body: Yeah nice try, if I take other people's 3D models to use in my game I ask for permission first. Most 3D models are made by me, as well as the code. And yes the logo is made by AI only because I suck at making logos and I'm a single dev who has been working on this game for eight months as a passion project. Would really appreciate a five star review! The hands are being fixed in the revamp, you can grab stuff, if not, you must be on an extremely old version, and simply turn down your headset volume if the music is too loud. it's really not that difficult. A five year old could do it...

reviews.review_description: Hello, developer of “SubLiminal Slop.” I have a few ideas on how to make your game better and more popular. Here are a few things you could add to the game and some bugs you could fix: Please fix the hands in the game, as they are almost upside down. Add the track “Tophats N’ Tools - Solar.mp3 (ChimpLab VR OST)” when entering the game, and also change the lobby music to “lethal ape lobby theme.” Make sure the monster named “Gus” isn’t in the ‘backrooms’ location; instead, have a new monster named “Taller” in that location. Add another monster to the mine. Make sure the monster named Gus is on the third floor, specifically in the parking lot. Make sure the monster Gus plays its original sound. Add a monster named “Gisser” that plays the sound “Wake Up The President,” and is entirely black with only small white eyes visible (it is located on the second floor and can also go down to the first floor). Add other monsters from the first part of the game “Lethal Ape.” Here are the monsters: Ashy, Sandman. Add a pool to the first floor if it isn’t there; if it is, then I apologize. A lot of things didn’t make it into this review, and I suggest we collaborate and create the game together—here’s my Discord: mroldik. I’m not asking for any money; I just want to help you create a really good game. Good luck!

developer_response.body: Well that is a very detailed and interesting review. Thank you for the kind words. Join my discord server please and we can continue this and you can share your ideas with me!

reviews.review_description: I have a friend Delepevor  Super nice, and he said the next update would be about my birthday.

developer_response.body: Thanks, the next update is a revamp of the entire game, which I've been working on for about three months.

reviews.review_description: 0/10 - Subliminal Slop is straight-up stolen garbage that needs to be deleted off Meta Quest right now. First of all, I’m writing this not only to warn every poor guy who might waste money on this trash, but for your own safety because this so-called “solo dev” straight ripped the entire map from Noxgames’ LAU (Lethal Ape Ultimate), slapped some weak subliminal nonsense on top, and called it his own masterpiece while clearly spending zero months actually making anything original. The monsters are stolen too some from a Buy Me a Coffee page, others straight from NTGfairy’s Ape project  then this thieving little kid removes all the real credits and slaps his own name on it like a greasy asset-hoarding clown thinking he’s clever. This isn’t a game, it’s low-effort skidded theft that feels like getting subliminally messed with while staring at buggy, half-baked slop. Delete it.

developer_response.body:
This review contains multiple accusations that are untrue, including claims that the game and its assets were stolen. No evidence is provided because these claims are false.

The review was submitted immediately after moderation action was taken against players who were breaking community rules, which raises concerns that it was posted as retaliation rather than as genuine feedback about the game.

I am always open to legitimate criticism and suggestions for improvement, but false accusations and personal attacks do not help players understand the actual quality of the game.

Next time don't call the owner of a game or anyone else the n-word, make your username vulgar language, or any of that stuff.
